label: Gregory of Nyssa, Homilies on the Song of Songs (incomplete)

work_wit.alt_title: Gregory of Nyssa, Homilies on the Song of Songs (incomplete)

note: Corresponds to Hom. 6: οὕτω τὸ καθαρὸν τῆς ψυχῆς ἀναφαίνεται κάλλος (ed. Langerbeck, p. 192, line 6)

excerpt.as_written: ܘܛܥܝܢ ܗܢܝܐܘܬܐ ܕܬܘܪܣܝܐ ܠܨ̈ܠܦܐ ܕܝܢ ܕܪ̈ܘܡܢܐ ܕܡܝ ...
note: Corresponds to Hom. 15: τῷ δὲ λεπύρῳ τῆς ῥόας τὸ μῆλον τῆς παρειᾶς ὡραΐζων μεγάλην τινα (ed. Langerbeck, p. 455, lines 10–11)

contents.label: Homily 15
note: Incomplete in the beginning and end

bib.citation: Langerbeck, Hermann. Gregorii Nysseni in Canticum canticorum (Gregorii Nysseni Opera 6). Leiden: Brill, 1960
